description: Chat pages include a breadcrumb link back to index.html
steps: Run 'chat4n6 run' on a WhatsApp fixture with at least one message
Read the generated page_001.html for any chat
Assert the page contains href='../../index.html' or href pointing to index.html

description: WAL delta records appear in deleted.html with [WAL-HISTORIC] or [WAL-PENDING] badge
steps: Produce an ExtractionResult with at least one WalDelta entry (status=DeletedInWal)
